case_title: RUSSELL BRIMER VS. SHOP AT HOME LLC et al

docket_entries.description: OBJECTION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: DISMISSAL & REQUEST TO VACATE OR MODIFY HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIMER, RUSSELL
